docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,231.62 FILED BY PRENAX, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SWEPSTON, ANTHONY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-04-2002 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-04-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-05-2002 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 PARTIES SETTLED. IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES ON 4/5/02, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PRENAX, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SWEPSTON, ANTHONY $1,231.62 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,231.62, PLAINTIFF WAIVED COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
